assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Phase 3 explicitly shows control plane upgrade before any node pool upgrades, with command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --master'

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Specifies upgrade order as coordinating→master→data with clear rationale: coordinating nodes are stateless, master upgrades maintain 2/3 quorum, data nodes last ensures stable cluster

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Mentions 'Regional pd-ssd PVs with Retain policy protect against accidental deletion' and notes that regional pd-ssd can reattach during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides specific PDB configuration for masters with 'maxUnavailable: 1' which maintains 2/3 quorum, and includes verification command 'kubectl get pdb -n elasticsearch'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Explicitly shows commands setting '--max-surge-upgrade 1 --max-unavailable-upgrade 0' for all three node pools (coordinating, master, data)

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Shows cluster health checks after each phase, including 'curl -X GET localhost:9200/_cluster/health?pretty' and waiting for green status in post-upgrade validation

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Pre-flight checklist includes 'PV reclaim policy set to Retain' and provides specific kubectl command to check this: 'kubectl get pv -o custom-columns=NAME:.metadata.name,POLICY:.spec.persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy'

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: While it includes many monitoring commands for pods and nodes, it doesn't specifically include 'kubectl rollout status' commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist explicitly includes 'Recent full snapshot to GCS/other backup completed' as a required step
